generated_oml:
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring I_M used for dynamic friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder providing motor angular position r_M for joint behavior monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary gearbox encoder delivering gearbox angular position r_G for friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance ControllerAngularPositionSignal : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Robot controller outputting joint angular position ω position for real‑time monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance ControllerAngularVelocitySignal : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Robot controller outputting joint angular velocity ω for drift analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance ControllerPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControllerAngularPositionSignal
]

instance ControllerVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControllerAngularVelocitySignal
]

instance I_MData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current I_M time‑series used for friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor angular position r_M time‑series for joint behavior visualization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox angular position r_G time‑series for friction loss estimation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance ControllerPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured joint position signal from controller for real‑time monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance ControllerVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured joint angular velocity ω from controller for drift analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque τ generated by executable Simulink friction models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity ω derived from motor simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorPositionTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor position trace ^r_M with time‑series of torque and angular velocity."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearboxPositionTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox position trace ^r_G with time‑series of torque and angular velocity."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputPositionTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output position trace ^r_out containing torque and angular velocity."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT enabler publishing real‑time sensor data streams to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardService, ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink enabler executing executable calculation models for simulation."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationExecutionService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML enabler providing BBD and IBD structural models of the motor and gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell enabler linking physical asset data to digital twin models."
    DTDFVocab:enables AASIntegrationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom web‑based dashboard enabler for real‑time data visualization."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardService
]

instance ProcessingComponentEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing component executing simulation and calculation models for continuous friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService, ParameterUpdateService
]

instance RealTimeDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time dashboard visualizing measured and simulated data traces."
    DTDFVocab:provides JointBehaviorComparisonInsight
]

instance ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously identifying friction by comparing simulations with live measurements."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight, UpdateFrictionModelAction
]

instance SimulationExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Execution of white‑box and black‑box models to simulate motor behavior."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossEstimatesInsight
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Presentation of SysML structural block‑definition and internal‑block diagrams."
]

instance ParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Allow operators to update friction model parameters after identification."
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateFrictionModelAction
]

instance AASIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of data sources and models via Asset Administration Shell."
    DTDFVocab:provides AASIntegrationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight comparing simulated versus measured torque/velocity to identify friction coefficients."
]

instance JointBehaviorComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight visualizing joint behavior comparison for maintenance decision support."
]

instance FrictionLossEstimatesInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight giving static, kinetic, viscous friction loss estimates for the gearbox."
]

instance AASIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing linkage of data sources and model references via AAS."
]

instance UpdateFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to update friction model parameters based on identification output."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SysMLMotorGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block-definition and internal‑block diagrams of the motor and gearbox structure."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the motor generating torque and velocity traces."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the gearbox for friction simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb–Viscous friction behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing the Stribeck friction law."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing the Dahl friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing the LuGre dynamic friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponentEnabler
]

instance RobotVerticalAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot."
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment housing the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot."
    base:contains RobotVerticalAxisComponent
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time data acquisition and processing; the digital shadow reacts to incoming sensor samples as they arrive (sample rates are determined by the robot controller, typically in the kHz range but not explicitly specified)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized digital shadow consisting of: the asset (first axis), engineering models (SysML), simulation models (Simulink), data‑trace sources (MQTT streams), processing component (executes simulation/calc models), and a dashboard displaying measured vs. simulated traces, providing a unified view of the twin’s data and models."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers design (SysML structural model of axis and gearboxes), manufacturing (physical construction of motor and gearboxes), and operation (continuous identification of friction during runtime), bridging ideal, manufactured, and operating system stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured by combining analytical (white‑box) and data‑driven (black‑box) friction models that capture load, temperature, and time effects; validity is achieved through continuous comparison of simulated outputs against live measurements and by maintaining traceability for each data point to its generating processing component. Parameter uncertainty is managed by updating friction model parameters during runtime."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data are transferred from the robot to the digital shadow over MQTT, a lightweight publish/subscribe messaging protocol. The digital shadow may expose its services through the Asset Administration Shell, connecting the physical asset and the logical model."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML (ISO/IEC 29148) for MBSE and the Asset Administration Shell conforms to the Industrie 4.0 standard for digital twins, enabling interoperability; specific standard references beyond these are not detailed."
]
